items.title: Netanyahu says Israel should 'break free' of U.S. military aid
items.summary: "I deeply appreciate the support we have received from our American friends, but we need to break free from dependency and build our own independent armaments network," the premier told reserve officers on a training course in the occupied West Bank

items.title: Hungary passes anti-graft measures, eyeing EU funds

items.title: Daily Quiz | On history of the treaties and territory of Antarctica
items.summary: The Antarctic Treaty System, which came into force on June 23, 1961, remains one of the most ambitious international frameworks governing an entire continent. How well do you know the history of the treaties and territory of Antarctica?
